description:
In this video, I share my personal experience of buying insurance online through Policybazaar and Coverfox. I'll discuss the pros and cons of using these platforms and highlight some potential pitfalls to be aware of.

Here are some specific points you could cover in your video:

Ease of use: How easy was it to find and compare policies on each platform?
Price: Did you get competitive quotes on both platforms?
Customer service: How responsive and helpful was the customer service team for each platform?
Claim process: Did you have any issues filing a claim? If so, how were they resolved?

comments.text:
नई कार खरीदते समय 1 साल का 1st Party insurance देते है और 3 साल का 3rd Party car insurance देते है।
पर अपन 2nd और 3rd year भी 1st party insurance ले लेते है।
पर जब गाड़ी को 3 साल पूरे हो जाते हैं, तो क्या हमे फिर से 1st और 3rd party insurance दोनो लेने पड़ते है?????
और क्या हम 1st party insurance लेते है, तो उसमें 3rd party insurance साथ में ही कवर नहीं होता?????

गाड़ी जब 3 साल पुरानी

comments.text: Ha bhai , 2-3 saal ka 3rd party nhi lena hota hai, aur 3 saal 1stparty ka saat 3rd party milta he hai, but na ho to include kra lo, 3rd party ka bhut he jaruri hai, 1st party matalb app and car ka damage milaga, aur 3rd party Matlab apki gaadi se koi damage ho uska cover hota hai
